theme-1.name: Polynesian
theme-1.description: Moonlit Polynesian coast in deep cobalt tones, silver surf, and quiet lunar haze with restrained tiki presence
theme-1.motifs: Moon crescents, starlit ocean waves, Polynesian spirals, pearl inlays, palm silhouettes

inspirations: Polynesian tiki carvings and sacred temple totems
Tribal tattoo art and oceanic cultural symbols
blockData.blockPrompt: A wide 4:1 horizontal Polynesian tiki panel, screen-print style on a solid black background. In the exact center: a simplified tiki mask face with abstract slit eyes (no round pupils), broad nose, grinning mouth with teeth — painted in mid-grey (#8A8278) with black outlines. The face is compact, fitting in the center quarter of the width. Flowing directly out of the face on both sides: large bold tribal spirals and wave curves, connected to the cheeks and chin — the patterns grow organically from the face with zero gap. Only 2-3 large spirals per side, each thick and chunky. Style: bold flat painted shapes on black ground, thick confident brush strokes, slight paint texture and grunge, like a hand-pulled screen print. All painted shapes are neutral mid-grey tones only (#706860 to #A09888), black ground visible between shapes. High contrast. No fine detail — every element is large, thick, and graphic. The panel fills edge-to-edge, sharp corners, 1024x256 pixels, fully opaque.

theme-1.scene: Tranquil Polynesian shoreline at deep night, a single distant tiki statue near the waterline, cobalt moonlight across rolling waves, silver foam on black sand, and a star-rich sky
theme-1.loadingScene: Moonlit coastal detail with cobalt surf, silver spray, and one subtle carved tiki element in the distance; deep indigo shadows and pale blue-white highlights
theme-1.mapScene: deep dark cobalt ocean water with gentle rolling waves, moonlit silver highlights on the swells, deep indigo and navy blue tones
theme-1.bossLandmark: Sacred tiki temple on a volcanic cliff, massive carved tiki faces flanking a glowing lava-lit entrance, torches blazing against the night sky
theme-1.gridMaterial: Dark indigo volcanic basalt with faint moon-etched tribal patterns and subtle silver-blue highlights

music.menu: A warm Polynesian lo-fi instrumental with soft ukulele fingerpicking over gentle log drum rhythms and ocean wave ambience. Nose flute melody floats through warm island breeze. Around 90 BPM, rhythmic and inviting.
music.gameplay: A lively Polynesian instrumental with rhythmic ukulele strumming and warm log drum grooves. Nose flute melody and conch shell accents float over a steady island pulse. Around 115 BPM, sunny and groovy.
